name: Quick Chicken and Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium nonstick skillet over medium-high heat, cook chicken for 10 minutes or until browned.
2. Sprinkle with garlic powder and paprika. Set chicken aside.
3. Add broth, basil, pepper, and vegetables to the skillet. Bring to a boil.
4. Stir in noodles. Return chicken to the pan.
5. Reduce heat to low. Cover and cook for 10 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink. If desired, garnish with fresh basil.
Serves 4 - 245 calories - 4 fat grams
